Bomb Squad Baseball

From the Youth Circuit to the Big Diamonds — We Crush.

Las Vegas Valley's premier baseball club for elite youth development and championship-caliber adult wood bat play.

Our Programs

Two divisions. One mission. Drop Bombs.

⚾

Youth Select

14U – 18U

We scout and assemble the most explosive talent from across the Las Vegas Valley for high-level tournament play.

  • Top-tier regional tournaments
  • High school & college prep
  • Aggressive hitting philosophy
  • Hand-picked valley-wide roster
🏆

Adult NABA

18+ Upper Division

For the lifers who still have the itch to compete at a professional standard with wood bats.

  • Winter/Spring Champions
  • Promoted to Upper Division
  • Wood bat competition
  • Owner/Manager plays on roster

🏆 2026 Winter/Spring Champions

Bomb Squad dominated the NABA Lower Division and earned promotion to the Upper Division.

Why Bomb Squad?

We bridge the gap between youth development and adult excellence.

💣

The Philosophy

Our name says it all. We preach aggressive hitting, disciplined approaches, and the power to Drop Bombs.

🌵

Valley-Wide

We assemble players from every corner of the Las Vegas Valley to create powerhouse lineups.

🔥

All Levels

From 14U prospects to adult veterans, we develop players who compete at the highest levels.

"We aren't just a team; we're a culture. Whether you're a 15-year-old looking to get scouted or a veteran looking to add more hardware to the trophy case, if you can swing it, you belong with us."

— Charles, Owner/Manager/Player

Join The Squad

Ready to take your hacks with the best in the Valley? Fill out our prospect form and Sophie, our Club Coordinator, will get back to you regarding roster spots, schedules, and tryouts.

Get On The Radar
